title: cyrtopera acutilabra
intro: Cyrtopera acutilabra, also known as the "Horned Coral Tree" or "Acutilabra", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyrtopera acutilabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional African medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
